scopes.scopeName: Shared Causal Foundation and Evidence Contracts

tests.description: causal anti-hindsight excludes evidence first available after decisionAt
causal clustering collapses announcement-linked market reactions to one reason
causal sensitivity never neutralizes stale or unavailable required evidence
committed causal contracts are source-complete time-safe and deterministic
causal decision digest is stable when later evidence and outcomes are appended
shared canary: RLDATA cache and toolReads contracts remain unchanged
shared canary: RLAPP resource states remain unchanged without causal registration
Regression: served causal contracts preserve explicit stale and unavailable states
tests.command: npx playwright test tests/causal-rotation-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Regression: served causal contracts preserve explicit stale and unavailable states"

tests.description: Regression: Evidence available after a decision is excluded from that decision
tests.command: npx playwright test tests/causal-rotation-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Regression: Evidence available after a decision is excluded from that decision"

tests.command: npx playwright test tests/causal-rotation-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Regression: Decision-critical valuation and timing inputs are stale or unavailable"

tests.description: causal evaluator is deterministic and input-immutable across repeated recorded corpus runs
